subsidyType: citywide replacement project financed through the Illinois SRF plus voluntary full replacement coordination
publicSideCovered: yes the city replaces public-side segments as part of project phases or voluntary coordination
privateSideCovered: partial private-side work is city-managed in project phases but owner-requested voluntary replacement requires the owner to pay for private-side work
propertyRules: identified lead service lines are replaced through city project phases or through owner-requested voluntary full replacement coordination
contractorRules: field services and city contractors coordinate public-space work while owners arrange private plumbers for voluntary replacements
